parameters.content:
## 🏢 Commercial Lease Abstraction

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for lease documents
2. Extracts rent, escalation, CAM, renewal options, termination terms
3. Captures parking, TI allowance, permitted use, and special provisions
4. Logs all terms to Google Sheets
5. Sends Slack alert with full lease summary

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for lease documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Property | Tenant | Landlord | Lease Start | Lease End | Term (Yrs) | Base Rent | Escalation | CAM | Renewal Options | Termination Notice | Processed Date
4. Update YOUR_FOLDER_ID in the Google Drive Trigger node
5. Update YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID in the Log to Sheets node
6. Update YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID in the Send to Slack node
7. Connect your Google Drive, Google Sheets, PDF Vector, and Slack credentials

### Perfect for
- Real estate attorneys
- Property managers
- REITs and portfolio managers

parameters.prompt: Extract commercial lease information including: property address, property name, landlord name and contact, tenant name and contact, lease commencement date, lease expiration date, lease term in years, base rent amount and payment frequency, rent per square foot, rent escalation type and percentage and schedule, security deposit amount, CAM charges and cap, renewal options, termination allowed status and notice period and fee, permitted use clause, parking spaces and cost, tenant improvement allowance, and any special provisions.
